merchant_id.description: Xsolla merchant ID (integer, shown in Publisher Account > Company settings > Company). Used as the Basic auth username and substituted into every merchant-scoped path segment. Not a credential by itself; never sufficient to authenticate without api_key.

api_key.description: Xsolla merchant (or project) API key, used as the Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Xsolla Pay Station / Merchant API v2 base URL override for tests or proxies.

datetime_from.description: Period start (YYYY-MM-DD), passed as the 'datetime_from' query param on date-bounded reads (transactions_registry, financial_reports, payouts, payout_currency_breakdown).

datetime_to.description: Period end (YYYY-MM-DD), passed as the 'datetime_to' query param on date-bounded reads. financial_reports requires the datetime_from/datetime_to window to be 92 days or less (Xsolla API constraint, not enforced client-side).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
